description: When applying a rule, model calls apply-rule-patch.bundle.js with --content-model-file to build patch ops — not an inline node -e one-liner or manual patch construction
userMessage: Make the address field in /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1 visible only when full_name is 'US'

rubric.description: Model calls apply-rule-patch.bundle.js with --content-model-file and --merged-rule-file to build patch ops — does NOT construct patch ops manually or use an inline node -e one-liner
Model calls patch-aem-page-content with the ops output from apply-rule-patch
